articles.title: Ethereum Validators Stay Put Ahead of Pectra Upgrade — What This Means for ETH Price
articles.description: Ethereum is set to undergo its highly anticipated Pectra upgrade tomorrow, and on-chain data suggests that validators are preparing to weather any market volatility. Despite ETH’s lackluster price performance over the past week, the drop in validator exit points to a sense of confidence among network participants.
